phases.name: Dominio Identity
phases.description: Entidades de dominio puras: User, Role, Permission, Session, RefreshToken — sin imports de infraestructura

phases.name: Casos de uso Identity
phases.description: AuthUseCase (register, login, refresh, logout, 2FA), SessionManagementUseCase, RoleManagementUseCase, PermissionCheckUseCase

phases.name: Interface HTTP Identity
phases.description: AuthController, SessionsController, RolesController, PermissionsController, DTOs, Swagger, PermissionsGuard, OwnershipScope

phases.name: Tests Identity
phases.description: Tests unitarios para dominio, casos de uso; tests e2e para flujos de auth y RBAC

architecture: Hexagonal Architecture: domain/ → application/ → infrastructure/ → interface/. Módulo identity dentro de apps/api. Inyección de dependencias NestJS. PostgreSQL con Prisma. Redis para sesiones.
